themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "No meat offering, which ye shall bring unto the LORD, shall be made with leaven: for ye shall...". Word-study detail reinforces "יֵֽעָשֶׂ֛ה: that is made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 7 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And if thy oblation be a meat offering baken in the fryingpan, it shall be made of fine flour...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 7 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: תֵּֽעָשֶֽׂה׃: it shall be made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And thou shalt bring the meat offering that is made of these things unto the LORD: and when i...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: יֵֽעָשֶׂ֛ה: that is made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision.

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And the remnant of the meat offering shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is a thing most holy...". Cross references echo "Holy".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 3 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And the remnant of the meat offering shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is a thing most holy...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 3 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: קָֽדָשִׁ֖ים: holy - a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity

themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And the remnant of the meat offering shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is a thing most holy...". Cross references echo "Holy".

themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And every oblation of thy meat offering shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffe...". Cross references echo "Covenant".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 13 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And every oblation of thy meat offering shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffe...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 13 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: בְּרִ֣ית: of the covenant - a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)
